error_signature: text is disappearing with custom CSS for gradient color
title: Text disappears when applying gradient CSS to heading
symptom: The heading element becomes invisible when using custom CSS for a gradient color. The text does not appear as expected.
applies_when: Using custom CSS for gradient color
Applying CSS to a heading element
root_cause: The issue arises due to the auto-generated wrapper around the heading element, which interferes with the CSS properties applied for gradient text. The background-clip and text-fill properties may not render correctly in this context.
fix_steps: Insert the CSS code inside a <style> tag within the HTML Embed
Ensure the heading is styled correctly within this context
agent_instruction: Use an HTML Embed to apply the gradient CSS for the heading text.
